title: Got a Spare Trillion? Amazon AWS Glitch Leaves Consumers With Eye-Popping Bills
summary: A glitch at Amazon's cloud services division, Amazon Web Services (AWS), left consumers all over the world with bills that would bankrupt even Amazon founder Jeff Bezos. He told The Guardian he "almost had a heart attack" when he received the notification.
